channel.title: diary on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in diary on Analyst

item.title: How I Got Started With ARM
item.description: 📆 Friday, 12th of March, 202 ⏰ 09:00 ☀️ It was a very deceptively sunny morning, children laughing and squeaking merrily.

item.title: How I Got Started With AWS
item.description: In this blog post I am exploring AWS services (EC2). I am currently using a Free Tier license and I am trying to learn how to use.

item.title: Hacking the Art of Exploitation
item.description: I’ve been longing to finish Hacking the Art of Exploitation book, but I needed VM for that and this wasn’t very convenient.
